title: RS: Crafting Monitor in Grid
body:
# Features
 

1. Need least 1 Crafting Monitor in Network.
1. Then, will add a button added in grid what can show 'Crafting Monitor' screen.
1. Also, if close 'Crafting Monitor' screen, return to grid screen.

# Example
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JOA9kmlg/images/0b833c8416c7fa9d1e3313260a8fb1329131fe09.gif)
